zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton於大約1249年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾藍波頓時，她的父親Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton20歲，母親Christiana Hose21歲。她於大約1265年與David de Lindsay在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1274年在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾莫丁頓享年26歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton于大约1249年出生在苏格兰貝維其可爾藍波頓时，她的父亲Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton20岁，母亲Christiana Hose21岁。她于大约1265年与David de Lindsay在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1274年在苏格兰貝維其可爾莫丁頓享年26岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Lindsay  .
Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.
Korean: variant of   O  .
Japanese: variant of Ō (see O ).

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Lamberton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the barony of Lamberton in Berwickshire, or in some instances from Lamerton in Devon, recorded as Lambertone in 1232, from Old English lamb ‘lamb’ + burna ‘stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’, i.e. ‘farmstead on the lamb stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton was born about 1249, in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland, her father, Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton, was 20 and her mother, Christiana Hose, was 21. She married David de Lindsay about 1265, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1274, in Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland, at the age of 26, and was buried in Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton est née environ 1249, à Lamberton, Berwickshire, Écosse, son père, Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Christiana Hose, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé David de Lindsay environ 1265, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1274, à Mordington, Berwickshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterrée à Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton um 1249 in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton 20 und ihre Mutter Christiana Hose 21. Sie hat um 1265 in Scotland David de Lindsay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1274 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland und wurde in Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton è nata il circa 1249 nel Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland, sua padre, Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Christiana Hose, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato David de Lindsay circa 1265, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1274, nel Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolta a Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lambertonが約1249年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアランバートンで生まれた時，父Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lambertonは20歳，母Christiana Hoseは21歳であった。約1265年にスコットランドでDavid de Lindsayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1274年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアモーディントンで26歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton(이)가 대략 1249년 스컷랜드 버윅실르 램르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christiana Hose(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1265년 스컷랜드에서 David de Lindsay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1274년 스컷랜드 버윅실르 모르딩턴에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton nasceu aproximadamente 1249, em Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland, seu pai, Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Christiana Hose, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com David de Lindsay aproximadamente 1265, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1274, em Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland, com 26 anos, e foi sepultada em Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton родилась около 1249 г. в местности лэмбиртон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Christiana Hose, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David de Lindsay около 1265 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1274 г. в местности мордингтон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия в возрасте 26 лет и была похоронена в местности аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Lindsay of Lamberton nació aproximadamente 1249, en Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland, su papá, Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Christiana Hose, tenía 21 años. Se casó con David de Lindsay aproximadamente 1265, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1274, en Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultada en Ayrshire, Scotland.
